issue.title: Providing glob pattern to input flag does not produce TS d.ts files
issue.body: How to reproduce: run json2ts -i src/**/*.schema.json. Expected output: generated d.ts files in corresponding directories. Suggested fix: implement directory output and add CLI tests.

repository.description: CLI that compiles JSON Schema to TypeScript definitions

reasons: Unseen good candidate should remain visible.

issue.title: TableSelector silently truncates table list when DB has more tables than API page limit
issue.body: The useTables hook returns hasMore when backend has more tables than returned page, but TableSelector never consumes it. Steps to reproduce: connect schema with 100+ tables. Expected behavior: helper message warns user to refine search. Suggested fix: consume hasMore in TableSelector and add UI test.

repository.description: Data exploration and SQL Lab frontend

reasons: Shown candidate should be cooled below unseen comparable candidates.

issue.title: Log parent package when erroring during dependency install
issue.body: When uv fails during dependency install, the CLI error omits the parent package. Expected behavior: error output includes parent package chain. Suggested fix: add resolver error context and CLI snapshot test.

repository.description: Fast Python package manager and CLI

reasons: Read candidate should be strongly cooled in future ranking versions.

issue.title: [preview2-shim] Runtime values are exported only as types
issue.body: Runtime values such as streams are exported only as types. Expected behavior: generated declarations expose runtime values. Suggested fix: adjust generated exports and add regression tests.

repository.description: JavaScript tooling for WebAssembly components and TypeScript bindings

issue.title: TOCTOU: call Path::metadata after Path::exists
issue.body: Detect Path::exists followed by metadata. Expected behavior: lint suggests a single metadata call. Suggested fix: implement lint and UI tests.

issue.title: Controlling Context in Client for Sampling Requests
issue.body: The Python SDK client does not expose enough control over sampling request context. Suggested fix: add client option and tests.
